name: Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Kernel Modules and Extensions (read)
description: Persistence / TA0003 + Privilege Escalation / TA0004. Read-only enumeration of loaded kernel modules via `lsmod` plus the persistent module list at /etc/modules-load.d/. An attacker would use this to identify modules to inject into or replace. Captures the post-foothold persistence-surface enumeration step. No modules loaded or modified.
exec: echo '--- loaded modules (first 10) ---'; lsmod 2>&1 | head -11 || echo '(no lsmod)'; echo '--- /etc/modules-load.d/ ---'; ls /etc/modules-load.d/ 2>/dev/null || echo '(no modules-load.d)'
